prompt: Build a Services list page with a filter toolbar that has 2 quick filters (Status and Protocol), a search bar, and a More filters button. Include a table below showing service name, protocol badge, status badge, and an actions column. Use Kongponents.

assertions.text: Filter pills use dashed borders when unapplied
Filter pills use solid primary border when applied
More filters+ button exists with AddIcon
Uses CSS variables (var(--color-*)) not raw hex values
Table has actions column with MoreIcon or similar dropdown trigger
Uses Vue 3 <script setup lang="ts"> SFC pattern
Icons imported from @kong/icons with correct PascalCase names
